name: io.github.wtthornton/tapps-mcp
title: TappsMCP
description: MCP server providing deterministic code quality tools for AI coding assistants. Includes code scoring (0-100 across 7 categories), quality gates, security scanning, dead code detection, dependency vulnerability scanning, domain expert consultation, documentation lookup, and shared memory for cross-session knowledge.

environmentVariables.name: TAPPS_MCP_PROJECT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Project root directory for file operations (defaults to current working directory)

environmentVariables.name: CONTEXT7_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Context7 documentation lookup (optional, enables enhanced doc lookup)

environmentVariables.name: TAPPS_MCP_QUALITY_PRESET
environmentVariables.description: Quality gate preset: standard, strict, or framework (default: standard)

environmentVariables.name: TAPPS_MCP_ADAPTIVE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable adaptive learning from feedback (default: false)

tools.name: tapps_session_start
tools.description: Initialize session, return server info and configuration

tools.name: tapps_server_info
tools.description: Discover version, available tools, and installed checkers

tools.name: tapps_score_file
tools.description: Score a code file across 7 quality categories (0-100)

tools.name: tapps_quick_check
tools.description: Fast score + gate + security check after file edits

tools.name: tapps_quality_gate
tools.description: Check if a file passes quality thresholds

tools.name: tapps_validate_changed
tools.description: Batch validate multiple changed files

tools.name: tapps_security_scan
tools.description: Run security analysis with Bandit and secret detection

tools.name: tapps_dead_code
tools.description: Detect unused functions, classes, imports, and variables

tools.name: tapps_dependency_scan
tools.description: Scan dependencies for known CVEs

tools.name: tapps_dependency_graph
tools.description: Build import graph and detect circular dependencies

tools.name: tapps_lookup_docs
tools.description: Look up library documentation via Context7 or LlmsTxt

tools.name: tapps_validate_config
tools.description: Validate Dockerfile, docker-compose, or infra config

tools.name: tapps_consult_expert
tools.description: [DEPRECATED] Use tapps_lookup_docs instead

tools.name: tapps_research
tools.description: [DEPRECATED] Use tapps_lookup_docs instead

tools.name: tapps_impact_analysis
tools.description: Analyze what depends on a file before API changes

tools.name: tapps_report
tools.description: Generate quality report (JSON, Markdown, or HTML)

tools.name: tapps_memory
tools.description: Shared memory for cross-session knowledge persistence

tools.name: tapps_session_notes
tools.description: Save and recall session-local notes

tools.name: tapps_checklist
tools.description: Track which tools were called, report missing steps

tools.name: tapps_dashboard
tools.description: Review TappsMCP performance metrics

tools.name: tapps_stats
tools.description: Usage statistics with recommendations

tools.name: tapps_feedback
tools.description: Report whether tool output was helpful

tools.name: tapps_init
tools.description: Bootstrap TappsMCP in a project

tools.name: tapps_upgrade
tools.description: Upgrade generated files after version update

tools.name: tapps_doctor
tools.description: Diagnose configuration issues

tools.name: tapps_set_engagement_level
tools.description: Set AI prompting intensity (high/medium/low)

prompts.name: tapps_pipeline
prompts.description: Recommended tool call order for different task types
